channel.title: GitHub Kotlin Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Kotlin in GitHub

item.title: gedoor/legado
item.description: Legado 3.0 Book Reader with powerful controls & full functions❤️阅读3.0, 阅读是一款可以自定义来源阅读网络内容的工具，为广大网络文学爱好者提供一种方便、快捷舒适的试读体验。

item.title: CCBlueX/LiquidBounce
item.description: A free mixin-based injection hacked client for Minecraft using the Fabric API

item.title: DD3Boh/OuterTune
item.description: A Material 3 Music Player with YouTube Music support for Android. Forked from InnerTune

item.title: tiann/KernelSU
item.description: A Kernel based root solution for Android

item.title: MatsuriDayo/NekoBoxForAndroid
item.description: NekoBox for Android / sing-box / universal proxy toolchain for Android

item.title: zaneschepke/wgtunnel
item.description: An alternative Android client app for WireGuard VPN

item.title: 2dust/v2rayNG
item.description: A V2Ray client for Android, support Xray core and v2fly core

item.title: z-huang/InnerTune
item.description: A Material 3 YouTube Music client for Android

item.title: deniscerri/ytdlnis
item.description: Android Video/Audio Downloader app using yt-dlp

item.title: lizongying/my-tv-0
item.description: 我的電視·〇 電視視頻播放軟件，可以自定義視頻源

item.title: JunkFood02/Seal
item.description: 🦭 Video/Audio Downloader for Android, based on yt-dlp, designed with Material You

item.title: gkd-kit/gkd
item.description: 基于无障碍，高级选择器，订阅规则的自定义屏幕点击 Android 应用 | An Android APP with custom screen tapping based on Accessibility, Advanced Selectors, and Subscription Rules

item.title: aniyomiorg/aniyomi
item.description: An app for manga and anime

item.title: iSoron/uhabits
item.description: Loop Habit Tracker, a mobile app for creating and maintaining long-term positive habits

item.title: bannedbook/fanqiang
item.description: 翻墙-科学上网

item.title: jellyfin/jellyfin-androidtv
item.description: Android TV Client for Jellyfin

item.title: d4rken-org/sdmaid-se
item.description: SD Maid 2/SE is Android's most thorough cleaning tool.

item.title: ReVanced/revanced-patches
item.description: 🧩 Patches for ReVanced

item.title: yujincheng08/BiliRoaming
item.description: 哔哩漫游，解除B站客户端番剧区域限制的Xposed模块，并且提供其他小功能。An Xposed module that unblocks bangumi area limit of BILIBILI with miscellaneous features.

item.title: florisboard/florisboard
item.description: An open-source keyboard for Android which respects your privacy. Currently in early-beta.
